content.en:
"Then use the aura of the Doomsday within this bead to create the seventh form!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Then, he used a replica body to devour a wisp of the breath of the Final Tribulation, and used his body to feel the subtlety of the breath of the Final Tribulation.

Rumble!!!!!

This wisp of the breath of the final calamity is destroying Ye Tian's body without ~ breaking.

The breath of the Final Tribulation is very terrifying, even the Ultimate Ancient Demons, they don't dare to absorb the breath of the Final Tribulation, and when the Final Tribulation comes, the Ultimate Ancient Demons also shield the breath of the Final Tribulation, trying not to be affected.

But even if you don't absorb it, once you get close, it will be affected.

Of course, this final tribulation could not affect Ye Tian's will, but if the physical body forcibly absorbed it, it would undoubtedly cause problems with the physical body, or even collapse.

In order to thoroughly comprehend the subtlety of the aura of the Final Tribulation, Ye Tian forcibly refined the breath of the Final Tribulation, and after spending a period of time, this replicating body finally couldn't bear it.

Click!!!

Ye Tian's copy body was shattered little by little under the influence of the aura of the Final Tribulation, and he could prevent this situation and delay it for a period of time, but it didn't make any sense.

Therefore, he did not stop this process at all, and even watched the process of the collapse of the physical body, so that he could learn more about the aura of the final calamity.

Soon, the replica body completely shattered and dissipated.

"The aura of the Final Tribulation is terrifying, it can destroy the body of the Ultimate Ancient Demon, making it difficult for it to recover, and it will also affect the Ultimate Will of the Extreme Dao, but it is precisely because of this that this power is extremely terrifying. The original Dovi Ancient Demon created an imperfect seventh form, the Final Form, and slaughtered all directions. It's a pity that the seventh form she created is only a crippled seventh form, and the side effects are too great, and after casting it, the physical body can't bear it, and it falls directly to death. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

If the original Dovi Ancient Demon created the perfect seventh form, then it would be the other Ultimate Ancient Demons who fell, and she could kill all the Ultimate Ancient Demons, unify the Endless Time and Space Domain, and become the only overlord on the Endless Time and Space Line.

However, all was not, and the Dovi Demon failed.

Maybe she chose to give up competing for the ultimate treasure of the space-time level Extreme Dao, or maybe she still had the hope of perfecting the seventh form without being besieged and killed.

"Continue to study the aura of the final calamity!"

Li Changsheng's second replica body began to continue its research, forcibly absorbing the aura of the Final Tribulation.

As time passed, Ye Tian's second replica body shattered again.

Then, the third replica body!

The fourth replica body!

The fifth replica body!

After a long period of time, Ye Tian had consumed a total of hundreds of replica bodies, and finally completely exhausted the aura of the Final Tribulation inside this bead.

And at such a huge cost, he had finally created a mutilated seventh form secret method.

This seventh form secret method is also similar to the seventh form secret method of the Dovi Ancient Demon, it is also the final form, and the side effects are also very large, once urged, his copy body will last for ten seconds at most.

Of course, ten seconds is already very good, you can burst out many attacks, and the combat power will be very amazing.

"Ten seconds of the seventh form is equivalent to the invincible form, and one of my replica bodies can cast the seventh form again and again, which is equivalent to completely mastering the seventh form. "

Ye Tian was already very satisfied.

He was now completely unafraid of those sleeping Ultimate Ancient Demons, and if he dared to cause trouble, he would directly burst out into the seventh form to bombard them.

"There seem to be many Ancient Demons in the Sleeping Places of the Ancient Demons, and there are even several Ultimate Ancient Demons who have awakened, but they have not come out yet. "

Ye Tian guessed that he had killed the Norm Ancient Demons, which made this group of Ultimate Ancient Demons jealous and did not dare to come out.

But as soon as a top-notch Ultimate Ancient Demon awakens, they will inevitably come out.

......

this day.

Where the Old Devils sleep.

Rumble!!!!

A terrifying aura permeated the air, causing many ancient demons and several ultimate ancient demons to look at each other.

"It's the Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon!"

The Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon, the top ultimate ancient demon of their era, once survived the battle to besiege and kill the Dovi Ancient Demon, and then had many opportunities, and his strength continued to improve, and now his strength is second only to the original Dovi Ancient Demon, and he has also mastered a space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane.

Rumble!!!

The Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon awakened and walked out of his independent void, and an ancient giant shield appeared behind him, which was one of his ultimate treasures and his toughest defensive barrier.

"I've seen the Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon!"

"The news of this era is for me!"

Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon said.

Those Ultimate Ancient Demons hurriedly handed over the information to the Heavenly Shield Ancient Demons.

After absorbing the intelligence news, the Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon was slightly angry: "Dare to kill the Norm Ancient Demon, the juniors of this era are not small. "

Although the other party killed the Ancient Demon of Nome and his strength is not bad, but he does not put it in his eyes, in an era where there are only a few powerhouses comparable to the ancient demon level, what powerful characters can be born?

However, he is good at defense, and his attack power is not very terrifying, and he may not be able to kill Ye Tian.

So, he looked somewhere and shouted, "Big brother, you have recovered, wake up quickly!"

The next moment, a terrifying Extreme Dao Ultimate Sword Dao aura permeated.

An Ultimate Ancient Demon stepped out, a giant sword hovering behind him.

This ultimate ancient demon is the Heavenly Sword Ancient Demon, and the attack is unparalleled.

Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon, Heavenly Sword Ancient Demon, are brothers, take different paths, and are also the two ultimate ancient demons of the Tianshu Lord, once they join forces, they can be called invincible.

"Second brother, I still want to sleep a little longer!"

Heavenly Sword Ancient Demon said with a smile.

"It's all recovered, what are you still sleeping, let's go, let's go kill a Extreme Dao Ultimate Supreme Venerable comparable to the Ultimate Ancient Demon of this era!"

"Then kill him, with the strength of our joint efforts, it will naturally be easy to kill a junior!"

Whew!!

The two ultimate ancient demons walked out of the sleeping land, and the other ancient demon-level powerhouses followed one after another.

They were afraid of Ye Tian before, but what are they afraid of now, no matter how strong Ye Tian's strength is, can he still beat the Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon and the Heavenly Sword Ancient Demon?

......

"Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon, Heavenly Sword Ancient Demon, it's them!"

Ye Tian's gaze looked through the void, looked at the two figures in the sleeping place, and immediately recognized the six.
